goal: Seam-tracking welder persona: UR10 follows a weld seam on a workpiece using impedance-compliant Cartesian path with adaptive correction from vision_plan_trajectory feedback. Realizes ONET SOC 51-4121 yrkesroll-welder-seam-track-002.
thoughts: Seam tracking = two-phase motion: (1) rigid transit to seam start via plan_trajectory, (2) compliant follow along seam via follow_trajectory_with_compliance with vision correction loop.
UR10 preferred over Franka: longer reach for weld-table setups; torque mode supported via ros2_control. Robot kind = 'ur10'.
Impedance stiffness: Kx=[600,600,200] N/m — high lateral (X/Y) to stay on path, soft Z (200) for consistent torch contact pressure ~5 N.
vision_plan_trajectory called once per seam segment (3 segments) to correct waypoints against live viewport deviation; instruction = 'follow the weld seam from left to right'.
check_singularity run before each segment start — UR10 notorious for wrist singularities at flat-seam poses.
follow_trajectory_with_compliance: compliance_handoff_at=0.05 (rigid only for first 5% approach), compliance_controller='cartesian_impedance', timeout_s=60.0.
release_compliance at end to restore rigid joint-target path before robot retreat.
Workpiece: Box prim representing a steel plate with a weld seam modeled as a groove mesh — approximated as a flat Cube with semantic label 'seam_target'.
No actual arc/heat simulation: tool-tip is torch approach, success = torch traverses seam start-to-end within 2 mm deviation.
motion_controllers: impedance (seam follow) + curobo (transit to seam start)
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Weld table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/WeldTable", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0.6, 0, 0.4], scale=[1.2, 0.8, 0.4])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/WeldTable", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Workpiece: steel plate, seam runs along X at Y=0.0, Z=0.815 ──────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Workpiece", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0.6, 0, 0.815], scale=[0.5, 0.3, 0.015])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Workpiece", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Workpiece", attr_name="primvars:semanticLabel",
              value="steel_plate")

# Seam marker prim (thin strip, semantic 'seam_target', used by vision_plan_trajectory)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/SeamMarker", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0.6, 0, 0.832], scale=[0.48, 0.005, 0.002])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/SeamMarker", attr_name="primvars:semanticLabel",
              value="seam_target")

# ── Robot: UR10, base at origin ───────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10",
    dest_path="/World/UR10",
    position=[0, 0, 0],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/UR10"],
    attr="physxArticulation:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

# ── Phase 1: check singularity at seam-start approach pose ───────────────────
check_singularity(
    articulation_path="/World/UR10",
    target_position=[0.35, 0.0, 0.90],
    target_orientation=[0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Phase 2: plan rigid transit to seam-start approach ───────────────────────
plan_trajectory(
    articulation_path="/World/UR10",
    waypoints=[
        {"position": [0.35, 0.0, 0.90], "orientation": [0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068]},
        {"position": [0.35, 0.0, 0.845], "orientation": [0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068]}
    ],
    planner="rmpflow",
    robot_type="ur10",
)

# ── Phase 3: install impedance controller — soft Z for torch contact ──────────
setup_impedance_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_frame="tool0",
    Kx=[600.0, 600.0, 200.0],
    Kr=[60.0, 60.0, 20.0],
    Dx=[60.0, 60.0, 20.0],
    Dr=[6.0, 6.0, 2.0],
    null_space_stiffness=0.3,
    null_space_damping=0.3,
    torque_mode=True,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Phase 4: vision plan seam trajectory (3 segments) — adaptive correction ──
for seg_idx in range(3):
    vision_plan_trajectory(
        instruction="follow the weld seam from left to right on the steel plate",
        num_points=10,
    )

# ── Phase 5: update compliance params for final segment (lighter contact) ─────
set_compliance_params(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    stiffness_xyz=[400.0, 400.0, 150.0],
    damping_xyz=[40.0, 40.0, 15.0],
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Phase 6: follow seam with compliant controller ────────────────────────────
follow_trajectory_with_compliance(
    trajectory=[
        {"pose": {"position": [0.35, 0.0, 0.837], "orientation": [0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0.55, 0.0, 0.837], "orientation": [0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0.75, 0.0, 0.837], "orientation": [0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068]}},
        {"pose": {"position": [0.85, 0.0, 0.837], "orientation": [0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068]}}
    ],
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    compliance_handoff_at=0.05,
    compliance_controller="cartesian_impedance",
    timeout_s=60.0,
    velocity_scaling=0.3,
    dry_run=True,
)

# ── Phase 7: read end-effector state and release compliance ───────────────────
get_kinematic_state(
    prim_path="/World/UR10/tool0",
)

release_compliance(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    dry_run=True,
)
extension_notes: Implements ONET SOC 51-4121 seam-tracking welder persona. Key: two-phase motion (rigid transit + compliant follow); vision_plan_trajectory provides adaptive waypoint correction per segment; impedance Z-softness (200 N/m) maintains ~5 N torch contact; check_singularity guards UR10 wrist-3 singularity at flat-seam poses. All compliance calls are dry_run=True pending ROS2 torque-bridge provisioning.
failure_modes: setup_impedance_controller dry_run=True — no live torque-mode control without ros2_control bridge; seam follow is simulated only
UR10 wrist singularity at flat-plate pose (elbow up config) — check_singularity may return condition_number>=100 requiring configuration switch
vision_plan_trajectory returns 2D image-space points; 3D mapping to world seam coordinates requires pixel_to_world call not included here
follow_trajectory_with_compliance compliance_controller='cartesian_impedance' — must match installed controller name in ros2_control; mismatch causes 400 error
SeamMarker is a static Cube — no physics; verify_args pick_path/place_path pointing to seam is a form-only proxy; real success criterion is torch path deviation <2 mm
code_template:
robot_wizard(robot_name={{primary_robot.class}}, dest_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}}, orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}})
setup_impedance_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_frame="tool0", Kx=[600.0,600.0,200.0], Kr=[60.0,60.0,20.0], Dx=[60.0,60.0,20.0], Dr=[6.0,6.0,2.0], torque_mode=True, dry_run=True)
vision_plan_trajectory(instruction="follow the weld seam on the workpiece", num_points=10)
follow_trajectory_with_compliance(trajectory=[{"pose": {"position": [0.35, 0.0, 0.837], "orientation": [0.0, 0.7071068, 0.0, 0.7071068]}}], robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, compliance_handoff_at=0.05, compliance_controller="cartesian_impedance", velocity_scaling=0.3, dry_run=True)
release_compliance(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, dry_run=True)
